title: Przenikanie się regulacji  materialnoprawnej i procesowej w procedurze zgłoszenia  robót budowlanych
author: Majchrzak, Bartosz
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: The article refers to a problem...
steps.instruction: The article refers to a problem of connections between substantive and procedural law in the field of administrative regulation. They are indicated in the area of single notions and legal actions connected with a particular administrative procedure. It is based on an assumption that there are some legal terms and acts, which have a double nature. Firstly, they are derived from substantive law (it is in that field we can find their legal grounds) and secondly, at the same time, they fulfil important functions in the procedure. Regarding the procedure of the notification of construction works, five examples of such elements are:

steps.title: a decision on lodging objections to...
steps.instruction: a decision on lodging objections to the commencement of construction works;

steps.title: not lodging any objections within the...
steps.instruction: not lodging any objections within the indicated term from delivery of the notification (‘silence of an organ’);

steps.title: an organ’s competence
steps.instruction: an organ’s competence. Therefore the considerations are concentrated on a so-called competence norm, which empowers definite organ of public administration to issue an administrative act (decision or ‘silence’) in certain substantive conditions and in conformity with the specified procedural regulations.
